●   The work behind the work

Anyone can press record. We start way earlier.

  • Audience before assumptions.
  • Strategy before story.
  • Push-back when the brief's wrong.
  • Senior team — the same one that pitched.
  • An edit that earns every frame.

By the time we say “action,” the hardest work is done.

TBM — 06 / ALWAYS-ON CONTENT
SECTION 06 / 10 · RETAINER MODEL
●   Always-On Content · Retainer

A senior content team on retainer. No agency markup. No fluff.

Most brands need a steady drip of cinematic content — not another six-figure brand film once a year. We built Always-On Content for the teams that already know what good looks like and want a partner who can ship it every week. Senior creative direction. Strategic content planning. Same crew, every shoot. One predictable monthly investment.

See how Always-On works →
Tap the iPad · Hear the work

TBM — 08 / HOW WE'RE DIFFERENT
SECTION 08 / 10 · STICKY-NOTE PILLARS
●   How we're different

Three reasons we don't get hired — and three we do.

01

Strategy first. Cameras second.

Most agencies wait for a brief and press record. We show up before the cameras roll — auditing your audience, challenging your assumptions, and building the strategy that shapes the story. Scripted or unscripted, real people, real stakes.

02

Cinematic, every frame.

Every frame matters. High-end production quality regardless of budget — senior craftsmen from day one, not an intern running your shoot while the creative director's on another project. Cinematic in structure, pacing, emotion, and impact.

03

Senior team, every project.

We invest creative equity into every project like we have skin in the game. Fortune 500 or first swing at something bigger — you get the same team, the same standard, and the same refusal to ship anything safe.

How we work in detail →
